column12: This hat is _____ than the other. (bad)
column14: The results are _____ than we've expected. (good)
column16: He is not the _____ boy in our group. He is as _____ as you are. (tall, tall)
column17: The _____ dinosaur egg found so far belonged to a long-necked dinosaur called Hypselosaurus. (big)
column18: Sirius is about twice as _____ as our Sun. (big)
column19: The Arctic Ocean is the _____ of the oceans. (cold)
column20: Which is _____ : the mosquito or the scorpion? (poisonous)
